en: :[name=\n[1]]:A village at the edge of the downward paths... I wonder how many travelers pass through here. :[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
:[name=Sign]:Eldergrove Reserve “A forest gifted by the Elven Kingdom after the Humanity–Demon war.”:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
:[name=\n[1]]:A forest beneath the earth... perhaps the world above was once like this as well. :[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
